findings.title: Operator precedence bug in admin group security check allows system:authenticated bypass
findings.evidence: In bindRole() the condition if roleName == admingroup-role && e == system:authenticated || e == '' has operator precedence issue. Same pattern in bindClusterRole(). Empty string guard fires for all role types due to missing parentheses.

findings.title: GenerateRandomHex produces half the expected entropy (16 bytes instead of 32)
findings.evidence: GenerateRandomHex(32) at monitoring.go line 401. Function does numBytes := length / 2 producing 16 bytes. Returns raw bytes not hex despite name. Session secret has 128 bits instead of expected 256.

findings.title: Self-signed certificate uses IsCA=true and KeyUsageCertSign for server certificates
findings.evidence: generateCertificate sets KeyUsage with KeyUsageCertSign and IsCA: true. Server TLS certificate is a CA capable of signing other certificates. If key compromised, attacker mints arbitrary trusted certs.

findings.title: Certificate serial number entropy bounded by current time and 1-year validity without rotation
findings.evidence: Serial number uses rand.Int(rand.Reader, big.NewInt(time.Now().UnixNano())) giving ~60 bits of range. Validity is 365 days with no automated rotation.

findings.title: IssuerURL field lacks format validation, potential for SSRF or misconfiguration
findings.evidence: OIDCConfig.IssuerURL has only Required validation. Passed directly to oauth2-proxy --oidc-issuer-url. Cluster admin could set internal URL.

findings.title: GatewaySpec.Domain field lacks format/pattern validation
findings.evidence: Domain field has no validation annotations. Flows into TLS cert generation, Gateway listener hostname, OAuth2 proxy redirect URL, cookie domain.

findings.title: Potential panic from unchecked array access on ClusterVersion.Status.History
findings.evidence: getOCPVersion() accesses History[0].Version without checking History slice length. Empty History causes panic during operator init.
